tasks.label: MCP: Validate launchers
args: $env:PROJECT_ROOT='${workspaceFolder}'; if (-not $env:GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN) { $env:GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN='dummy_local_token' }; Get-ChildItem '${workspaceFolder}\tooling\mcp\start-*.ps1' | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { & powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $_.FullName -ValidateOnly }

tasks.label: MCP: Docs parity check
args: $docsWithLaunchers=@('AGENTS.md','docs\tooling\mcp-servers.md'); $providerDocs=@('gemini.md','CLAUDE.md','CODEX.md','docs\agents\codex-mcp-prompts.md','docs\agents\codex.md'); $launcherTerms=@('ValidateOnly','start-filesystem.ps1','start-postgres.ps1','start-github.ps1','start-git.ps1','start-terminal.ps1','start-http.ps1','start-browser.ps1'); foreach($doc in $docsWithLaunchers){ $content=Get-Content $doc -Raw; foreach($term in $launcherTerms){ if($content -notmatch [regex]::Escape($term)){ throw "Missing $term in $doc" } } }; foreach($doc in $providerDocs){ $content=Get-Content $doc -Raw; foreach($term in @('AGENTS.md','ValidateOnly')){ if($content -notmatch [regex]::Escape($term)){ throw "Missing $term in $doc" } } }
